chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No.D- 2097 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Main Case 08-03-2023 Mr. Muhammad Yaqoob Soomro, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G a/w Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Chief Engineer, Sukkur Barrage, Muhammad Younis Domki, Superintendent Engineer, Khairpur Irrigation, Circle Sukkur. And Jamil Ahmed, XEN, West Division, Khairpur. ***** Compliance report is filed by Superintendent Engineer Khairpur Irrigation Circle Sukkur along with photographs, which is taken on record and copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioners. As per Irrigation Authorities, the site in question i.e. Kingri Minor was visited and the same is not in dangerous condition and there is no apprehension of mishap to raise Pakka path. Since this issue is disputed question, which cannot be resolved under writ jurisdiction, therefore, the petitioner is set at liberty to avail the remedy by filing civil suit, if he desires so. In view of above, instant petition stands disposed of in the above manner. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
